FAVORABLE CURRENTS ALWAYS WORK TO OWNERS’ ADVANTAGE.
-VESSEL HAS THE LIBERTY TO USE LSGO FOR MANOEUVRING IN NARROW WATER, CANALS, RIVERS, ON ENTERING/LEAVING PORTS, AND IN ADVERSE WEATHER. VESSEL HAS THE LIBERTY TO BURN LSGO DURING THE SWITCHOVER PERIOD PRIOR TO ENTERING AND LEAVING ECA ZONES.
